TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Pou-lilih-ta ka assi-kamou pæ-'ǣ-ahrum ki ka-harum-noumi pæ'ǣ-æmæh ki kaeuloungtou hahi-matta-en nein: heirou k'ma-kamou-hynna, aou-si-ah-kamou ki ou-vavarg-han ki Rara-man-oumi ka æiä-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Poulilihta ka assikamou pæ'ǣahrum ki kaharumnoumi pæ'ǣæmæh ki kaeuloungtou hahimattaen nein: heirou k'makamouhynna, aousiahkamou ki ouvavarghan ki Raramanoumi ka æiätounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Hebt acht dat ghy uwe aelmoesse met en doet boor de menschen om ban haer ghesien te worden : anders soo en hebt ghy geenen loon by uwen Dader die in de Hemelen is.
Take heed that ye do not your alms before men, to be seen of them: otherwise ye have no reward of your Father which is in heaven.
＂你們要小心，不可將善事行在人的面前，故意叫他們看見，若是這樣，就不能得你們天父的賞賜了。

S.FORM: Anna ta, herou ka pæ'ǣharum kow ki kaharum-mun, ynna pa-ï-oep ki j-oeb tou doummaymhou-an, mama ki pani-nni-en ki rÿh ki sou tou Paui-fafaal-an tou daradarang, alei ka loulough-auh ki ka-euloung: Missing koun-nau-kamou-râ maki-kahâ-to maki-valei ki ou-vavarg-han nein-da.

Anna ta, herou ka pæ'ǣharum kow ki kaharummun, ynna païoep ki joeb tou doummaymhouan, mama ki paninnien ki rÿh ki sou tou Pauifafaalan tou daradarang, alei ka louloughauh ki kaeuloung: Missing kounnaukamourâ makikahâto makivalei ki ouvavarghan neinda.
S.TRANSL: Wannee: ghy dan aelmoesle doet soo-en laet booy n nmiet trompetten ghelijck de gebepnsde in de Synagogen ende op de straten doen op datse ban de menschen ghe-eert moghen worden : Doorwaer segghe ick u n hebben haren loon wech.

Therefore when thou doest thine alms, do not sound a trumpet before thee, as the hypocrites do in the synagogues and in the streets, that they may have glory of men. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
所以，你施捨的時候，不可在你前面吹號，像那假冒為善的人在會堂裏和街道上所行的，故意要得人的榮耀。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

S.FORM: Irou-râ pæ'ǣ-harum-menhouta kaharummen, ynna pa-oumhaa ki 'eu-i-oho kamang ta ring-ei ki ouwal-da.
Irourâ pæ'ǣharummenhouta kaharummen, ynna paoumhaa ki 'euioho kamang ta ringei ki ouwalda.
S.TRANSL: Maerals gp aelmoesse doet soo en laet uwe slincker-(handc) niet weten wat uwe rechter doet.
But when thou doest alms, let not thy left hand know what thy right hand doeth:
你施捨的時候，不要叫左手知道右手所做的，

S.FORM: Alei ka itou-dung-ah ta pæ'ǣ-harum-enhou; ka Raramanoho ka kmi-dung kmytta pæǣpænæh-æh pæǣ-vli ymhou-an-da.
Alei ka itoudungah ta pæ'ǣharumenhou; ka Raramanoho ka kmidung kmytta pæǣpænæhæh pæǣvli ymhouanda.
S.TRANSL: Opdatuwe aclmoesse in het berborghen 3Â» : ende uwe Dader die in het berborgen fiet die sal hetu in het openbae: bergelden.
That thine alms may be in secret: and thy Father which seeth in secret himself shall reward thee openly.
要叫你施捨的事行在暗中。你父在暗中察看，必然報答你 。＂ （路11‧2－4）

S.FORM: Irou ka makou-Alilid-kow, assi kow mah-kaulaula-ah neini-æn ka pani-nni-en ki rÿh ki sou, ka mamoei mamoei makou-tohkouko ma kou-Alilid tou Pæui-sasaal-an tou vikour-appa ki dara-darang-ra, alei ka mæmæ'-æh ki kaeuloung. Dilligh koun-nau-kamou-râ, ka nimaki-kaha maki-valei ki ni-ou-va-varg-han nein.

Irou ka makouAlilidkow, assi kow mahkaulaulaah neiniæn ka paninnien ki rÿh ki sou, ka mamoei mamoei makoutohkouko ma kouAlilid tou Pæuisasaalan tou vikourappa ki daradarangra, alei ka mæmæ'æh ki kaeuloung. Dilligh kounnaukamourâ, ka nimakikaha makivalei ki niouvavarghan nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende wannee gy bid soen sult ghy met zijn gelijk de gebepnsoe : want die plegen gen geerne in de Synagogen ende op de hoecken der raten ltaende te bidden op dat sy bande menschen moghen gesien worden, Doorwaer ick segghe u dat n haren loon wegh hebben.

And when thou prayest, thou shalt not be as the hypocrites are: for they love to pray standing in the synagogues and in the corners of the streets, that they may be seen of men. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
＂你們禱告的時候，不可像那假冒為善的人，愛站在會堂裏和十字路口上禱告，故意叫人看見。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

S.FORM: Râ ymhou, dou makou-Alilid-kow, mou-rbo-a tou yhkaquaen-hou ka tou rbo, ka dou ni-illub kow ki alub oho, makou-Alilid-a ki Raraman-oho ka tou dung, ka Raraman oho ka kmi-dung kmytta, pæ'ǣ-likouh-ah pæ'ǣ-vli ymhou-an tou panæh-da.

Râ ymhou, dou makouAlilidkow, mourboa tou yhkaquaenhou ka tou rbo, ka dou niillub kow ki alub oho, makouAlilida ki Raramanoho ka tou dung, ka Raraman oho ka kmidung kmytta, pæ'ǣlikouhah pæ'ǣvli ymhouan tou panæhda.
S.TRANSL: Maer ghy wannee ghy bide gaet in uwe binnen-kame ende uwe deure geslotenhebbende bidtuwen Pade: die in het berborghen s endeuw' Yader die in het berborghen siet salhetu in't openbaer bergelden,
But thou, when thou prayest, enter into thy closet, and when thou hast shut thy door, pray to thy Father which is in secret; and thy Father which seeth in secret shall reward thee openly.
你禱告的時候，要進你的內屋，關上門，禱告你在暗中的父；你父在暗中察看，必然報答你。

S.FORM: Tou pakou-alilid-noumi ynna makou-haradouhat mama ki Heidang; ka pæu-raryh neini-æn ka tna-harum-meih papaki-valei alei ki pakou-rarinoug-han nein.
Tou pakoualilidnoumi ynna makouharadouhat mama ki Heidang; ka pæuraryh neiniæn ka tnaharummeih papakivalei alei ki pakourarinoughan nein.
S.TRANSL: Enalsgybidt sooen gebrupcke geen ydel berhael ban woorden geliick de hey dent: want sy meynen dat sp doo? Hare beelhept Va woorden sullen berhoore worden.
But when ye pray, use not vain repetitions, as the heathen do: for they think that they shall be heard for their much speaking.
你們禱告，不可像外邦人，用許多重複話，他們以為話多了必蒙垂聽。

S.FORM: Ynna k'ma-hynna ki kidi neini-an: ka moum'ha ta Raramannoumi, ka mæi-æäpoo-kamou ki mamang, rou assi-appa-kamou tmoumimia tyni-æn.
Ynna k'mahynna ki kidi neinian: ka moum'ha ta Raramannoumi, ka mæiæäpookamou ki mamang, rou assiappakamou tmoumimia tyniæn.
S.TRANSL: Wordet dan hae? niet gelijck:warit uw' Dader weet wat ghy ban noode hebt eer ghy hem biddet,
Be not ye therefore like unto them: for your Father knoweth what things ye have need of, before ye ask him.
你們不可效法他們；因為你們沒有祈求以先，你們所需用的，你們的父早已知道了。

S.FORM: Alei ki atta makou-Alilid-a makou-k'ma-hynna: Raman-jan ka itou-tounnoun kow ki vullu-vullum; Pakou-tiktik-auh (loumoulouh) ta Nanang-oho.
Alei ki atta makouAlilida makouk'mahynna: Ramanjan ka itoutounnoun kow ki vulluvullum; Pakoutiktikauh (loumoulouh) ta Nanangoho.
S.TRANSL: Ghy dan biddet aldus: Onse Dader die in de Hemelen ( zijt, ) Uwen Nagm werde geheplight
After this manner therefore pray ye: Our Father which art in heaven, Hallowed be thy name.
所以，你們禱告要這樣說：

S.FORM: Pa-irou'au ta Pei-sasou-an-oho. Paämt-au ta kamoei-en-hou, mama tou tounnoun ki vullum, k'ma-hynna tou Næi.
Pairou'au ta Peisasouanoho. Paämtau ta kamoeienhou, mama tou tounnoun ki vullum, k'mahynna tou Næi.
S.TRANSL: Uw' Koninckrhcke Rome. Uwen wille geschiede gelyck in den Hemel alsoo oock op der Aerden.
Thy kingdom come, Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven.
願你的國降臨；

S.FORM: Ph'ei-kame wæ'i k'atta ki paoul-ian ka mams-ing
Ph'eikame wæ'i k'atta ki paoulian ka mamsing
S.TRANSL: On Ons dagelicks broodt gheeft ons heden.
Give us this day our daily bread.
我們日用的飲食，今日賜給我們。

S.FORM: Atta-ral-a ki kæu-ittingen-hou ymiæn-an, mama ka attaral-kame ta ymi-æn ki kæu-itting-'niæn.
Attarala ki kæuittingenhou ymiænan, mama ka attaralkame ta ymiæn ki kæuitting'niæn.
S.TRANSL: Ende bergheeft ons onse schulden geliick oock wp bergheben onle schuldenaren.
And forgive us our debts, as we forgive our debtors.
免我們的債，

S.FORM: Ka inei-kame dmyllough tou repung-an, râ haoumi-ei-kame ki Littou. Ka a'mouhou ta Pei-sasou-an, ta pei-lpoug-han, ta keirang-en ki kidi tou yhkaquan myd-darynnough, Amen.
Ka ineikame dmyllough tou repungan, râ haoumieikame ki Littou. Ka a'mouhou ta Peisasouan, ta peilpoughan, ta keirangen ki kidi tou yhkaquan myddarynnough, Amen.
S.TRANSL: Endeenlepdt ons niet in berfoeckinge mae} berlolt ons ban den boosen. Want uw is het honinckrijcke ef de keacht efi de heerlickhept in der eeuwigheyt Amen, -
And lead us not into temptation, but deliver us from evil: For thine is the kingdom, and the power, and the glory, for ever. Amen.
不叫我們遇見試探；

S.FORM: Ka dou atta-ral-kamou ki kaeuloung ki ni-tau-rahei-en neid, dou-mia-ka attaral-al-appa ymoumi-æn ta Raraman-noumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Ka dou attaralkamou ki kaeuloung ki nitauraheien neid, doumiaka attaralalappa ymoumiæn ta Raramannoumi ka tou tounnoun ki vulluvullum.
S.TRANSL: Wantindien ghy den menschen hare misdaden bergeefc foo sal uwe hemeliche Yader oock u begheern.
For if ye forgive men their trespasses, your heavenly Father will also forgive you:
＂你們饒恕人的過犯，你們的天父也必饒恕你們的過犯；

S.FORM: Irou râ assi-kamou atta-ral ki kaeu-loung ki ni-tau-rahei-en nein, dou-miaka assi atta-ral-ah ta Raraman-oumi ki ni-tau-rahei-anoumi.
Irou râ assikamou attaral ki kaeuloung ki nitauraheien nein, doumiaka assi attaralah ta Raramanoumi ki nitauraheianoumi.
S.TRANSL: Mae: indien ghy den menschen haremitdaden niet en be:geefc soo en sal oock -Uwe Dader uwe misdaden niet berrgeben. :
But if ye forgive not men their trespasses, neither will your Father forgive your trespasses.
你們不饒恕人的過犯，你們的天父也必不饒恕你們的過犯。＂

S.FORM: Ka rou mi-rkud-kamou, ynna massau-voulas ma-ma ki paninni-en ki rÿh ki sou: ka pa-rummang ki vlung nein, alei ka mahauei-ah ki kaeuloung mama kimi-rarkud-da. Missing koun-naukamou, ka ni-mar'ato ki ni-ou-vavarg-han nein.

Ka rou mirkudkamou, ynna massauvoulas mama ki paninnien ki rÿh ki sou: ka parummang ki vlung nein, alei ka mahaueiah ki kaeuloung mama kimirarkudda. Missing kounnaukamou, ka nimar'ato ki niouvavarghan nein.
S.TRANSL: Ende wanneer ghy bast en toont geen droebigh gesichte geliick de gebepnsde: want sy mismaken hare acngesichten op dat sy ban de menschen en gelien worden als sy basten, Doorwaer ick segge u dat sy haren loon yyss
Moreover when ye fast, be not, as the hypocrites, of a sad countenance: for they disfigure their faces, that they may appear unto men to fast. Verily I say unto you, They have their reward.
＂你們禁食的時候，不可像那假冒為善的人，臉上帶着愁容；因為他們把臉弄得難看，故意叫人看出他們是禁食。我實在告訴你們，他們已經得了他們的賞賜。

S.FORM: Râ ymhou tou 'irarikdden-hou tib-boulou-â ki voungo-'ho, padioup-pau ta moula oho.
Râ ymhou tou 'irarikddenhou tibboulouâ ki voungo'ho, padiouppau ta moula oho.
S.TRANSL: Mae ghy als ghy balt salft uw' hooft ende walcht uw' aengelichte.
But thou, when thou fastest, anoint thine head, and wash thy face;
你禁食的時候，要梳頭洗臉，

S.FORM: Alei ka assi kow mäi-hga-hau-hauwei-ah ki kaeu-loung mama ki mi-rarkud, râ ki Raraman-appa'mhou ka itou-dung: ka Raramanoho ka kmi-dung kmytta, pæ'ǣvli-ah ymhou-an tou ræmæh.
Alei ka assi kow mäihgahauhauweiah ki kaeuloung mama ki mirarkud, râ ki Raramanappa'mhou ka itoudung: ka Raramanoho ka kmidung kmytta, pæ'ǣvliah ymhouan tou ræmæh.
S.TRANSL: Op dat het ban de mentchen niet gefien en werde als ghy bast maer uw Dade die in het berborgen is : ende uw' Dader die in t berborgen siet sal het y in t sdpenbaer beygelden.
That thou appear not unto men to fast, but unto thy Father which is in secret: and thy Father, which seeth in secret, shall reward thee openly.
不叫人看出你禁食來，只叫你暗中的父看見；你父在暗中察看，必然報答你。＂ （路12‧33－34）

S.FORM: Ynna paka-vang-ei ymoumi-æn ki vangei tou Næi ka si-dadanki væubæuh ki thæf, ka kouhkæu-in ka haouzoung-en ki ma-talliau.
Ynna pakavangei ymoumiæn ki vangei tou Næi ka sidadanki væubæuh ki thæf, ka kouhkæuin ka haouzoungen ki matalliau.
S.TRANSL: Prrgadert u gheen fchatcen op der aerden daerfe de motte ende roeft berderft ende daer de dieben doorgraben ende ltelen.
Lay not up for yourselves treasures upon earth, where moth and rust doth corrupt, and where thieves break through and steal:
＂不要為自己積攢財寶在地上；地上有蟲子咬，能銹壞，也有賊挖窟窿來偷。

S.FORM: Râ paka-vangei-â ymoumi-æn ki vangei tou tounnoun ki vullum, ka assi si-dadan ki bæubæuhki thæf-appa, ka assi kouhkæuh-in ka assi haouroung-en ki matalliau.
Râ pakavangeiâ ymoumiæn ki vangei tou tounnoun ki vullum, ka assi sidadan ki bæubæuhki thæfappa, ka assi kouhkæuhin ka assi haouroungen ki matalliau.
S.TRANSL: Maer beygadeet u fchatten in den Hemel daerfe noch motte noch roeft en berdertt ende dacr dedieben met en doorgraben noch en ftelen, . |
But lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust doth corrupt, and where thieves do not break through nor steal:
只要積攢財寶在天上；天上沒有蟲子咬，不能銹壞，也沒有賊挖窟窿來偷。

S.FORM: Ka toumang ta vangei-oumi, tou hynna-al-appa ta tintinoumi.
Ka toumang ta vangeioumi, tou hynnaalappa ta tintinoumi.
S.TRANSL: Want waer uwen schat 18 daer sal oock uw' herte
For where your treasure is, there will your heart be also.
因為你的財寶在哪裏，你的心也在那裏。＂ （路11‧34－36）

S.FORM: 'Æuyng ki vouäl ta matta; Irou rou mapæuh-pæuh mariang ta matta oho, doumiaka ma ymdâl-ato maræmæhta vouäl-oho.
'Æuyng ki vouäl ta matta; Irou rou mapæuhpæuh mariang ta matta oho, doumiaka ma ymdâlato maræmæhta vouäloho.
S.TRANSL: De keerfse des lichaems is de ooghe : indien dan uwe ooghe eenboudigh is foo sal uw' gehtel lichaem berlicht welen.
The light of the body is the eye: if therefore thine eye be single, thy whole body shall be full of light.
＂眼睛就是身上的燈。你的眼睛若瞭亮，全身就光明；

S.FORM: Irou ra m'att-'e ta mattaouho, damiaka maym-d'-âl-ato marimdim ta vouäl oho. Irou ka rimdim-an ta ræmæh ka itou-qua ymhou-an, irang-àl-ato ma-ma ki ma-ma ki mang ta karimdim-an (mamado?)
Irou ra m'att'e ta mattaouho, damiaka maymd'âlato marimdim ta vouäl oho. Irou ka rimdiman ta ræmæh ka itouqua ymhouan, irangàlato mama ki mama ki mang ta karimdiman (mamado?)
S.TRANSL: . Mac indien uw'ooge boos is soo sal geheel uw kichaem dupster zijn. Indien dan t licht datin y is duysterniffe is hoe groot (sal) de dunifternisse (selbe zijn 5}
But if thine eye be evil, thy whole body shall be full of darkness. If therefore the light that is in thee be darkness, how great is that darkness!
你的眼睛若昏花，全身就黑暗。你裏頭的光若黑暗了，那黑暗是何等大呢！＂ （路16‧13）

S.FORM: Assi hmahei ta ti-mamang â-douhia myligh ki Meireirang, ka mavahier-al-lava ki faät, ka mavæango-al-lava ki faät, ka unni-al-lava lava ki faät, mouroung-al-lava ki faät. Assi-kamou hmahei 'ss-al mylligh ki Alid ki Mammon-appa.

Assi hmahei ta timamang âdouhia myligh ki Meireirang, ka mavahierallava ki faät, ka mavæangoallava ki faät, ka unniallava lava ki faät, mouroungallava ki faät. Assikamou hmahei 'ssal mylligh ki Alid ki Mammonappa.
S.TRANSL: Niemant en kan twee Heeren dienen want of hy sal den eenen haten ende den anderen lief hebben of hy al en den eenen aenhangen ende den anderen berachten. Ghy en kondt niet Gode dienen en den Mammon.
No man can serve two masters: for either he will hate the one, and love the other; or else he will hold to the one, and despise the other. Ye cannot serve God and mammon.
＂一個人不能事奉兩個主；不是惡這個、愛那個，就是重這個、輕那個。你們不能又事奉上帝，又事奉瑪門 。＂ （路12‧22－31）

S.FORM: Alei ki anna pasousou-en-au-kamou, Ynna pæh-'kbou ki rÿh ki kæuag-hen-noumi, ka mang ta kan-nau-moumi, ka mang ta yhtau-moumi, (ynna pæh-'kbou-appa) ki vouäl-oumi, ka mang ta pammi-ei-moumi. Assi kaua masa-oun keirang-en ta kæu-ag-han ki kakan-nin? ta vouäl-appa ki pammammi-en?

Alei ki anna pasousouenaukamou, Ynna pæh'kbou ki rÿh ki kæuaghennoumi, ka mang ta kannaumoumi, ka mang ta yhtaumoumi, (ynna pæh'kbouappa) ki vouäloumi, ka mang ta pammieimoumi. Assi kaua masaoun keirangen ta kæuaghan ki kakannin? ta vouälappa ki pammammien?
S.TRANSL: Dagrom legge ick u: Sijt niet besorght boor uw' leben wat gy eten nde wat ghy drincken sult: noch boor uw lichaem waer mede ghy u kleeden sult, Js t leben met mee dan t boedsel ende 't lichaem dan de kleedin-

Therefore I say unto you, Take no thought for your life, what ye shall eat, or what ye shall drink; nor yet for your body, what ye shall put on. Is not the life more than meat, and the body than raiment?
＂所以我告訴你們，不要為生命憂慮吃甚麼，喝甚麼；為身體憂慮穿甚麼。生命不勝於飲食嗎？身體不勝於衣裳嗎？

S.FORM: Ararau-au ta ajajam ka sæu-æbigh tou vullum, k'assi-ah-au dmadri, k'assi-ah-au maäjam, k'assi-ah-au mallid tou kouvau; Râ pa-kan-nun-appa ta anna ki Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullum: Assi-kamou kana si ouro si-bavau ki anna ta ymoumi-ra?

Ararauau ta ajajam ka sæuæbigh tou vullum, k'assiahau dmadri, k'assiahau maäjam, k'assiahau mallid tou kouvau; Râ pakannunappa ta anna ki Raramanoumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullum: Assikamou kana si ouro sibavau ki anna ta ymoumira?
S.TRANSL: Aentsiet de bogelen des Ãžemels dat sy niet en raep# noch en maeyen noch en bersamelen in de schuerenende uw â€™ Hemelfche Vader boedt (nochtans) deselbe : en gaet ghy deselbe niet ( eer) beel te boben $ |
Behold the fowls of the air: for they sow not, neither do they reap, nor gather into barns; yet your heavenly Father feedeth them. Are ye not much better than they?
你們看那天上的飛鳥，也不種，也不收，也不積蓄在倉裏，你們的天父尚且養活牠。你們不比飛鳥貴重得多嗎？

S.FORM: Ti-mang ymoumi-æn ta pæh-'k-bou, pou-lpough pou-dima sat ka-yænah-en (ki pariou) tou ka-'angdag-an ki di'i tyn?
Timang ymoumiæn ta pæh'kbou, poulpough poudima sat kayænahen (ki pariou) tou ka'angdagan ki di'i tyn?
S.TRANSL: Wie doch banu kan met besorght te 3yn een elle tot syne lenghde toe doens
Which of you by taking thought can add one cubit unto his stature?
你們哪一個能用思慮使壽數多加一刻呢 ？

S.FORM: Kaumang ka pæh-'k-bou-noumi pæh-dimdim ki pammammi-an? Pouliliht-au ta seilouf ka tou pou-læh, mamei-mang ta tatatt-oul nein: assi si-ba ki na poungas, assi tmatinoun-ra.
Kaumang ka pæh'kbounoumi pæhdimdim ki pammammian? Poulilihtau ta seilouf ka tou poulæh, mameimang ta tatattoul nein: assi siba ki na poungas, assi tmatinounra.
S.TRANSL: Ende wat zijt ghy besorght boor de kleedinge $ Aenmerckt de Lehien des beldcs hoe sy waffen : sy en arbeyden niet noch en spinmnen niet :
And why take ye thought for raiment? Consider the lilies of the field, how they grow; they toil not, neither do they spin:
何必為衣裳憂慮呢？你想野地裏的百合花怎麼長起來；它也不勞苦，也不紡線。

S.FORM: Ka pasousou-en-au-ka-mou ka assi k'ma-hynna ni-pa-sih-tabung pa-pah-kissi ta ti Salomon tou tou ymmid ki keirang-en ki kidi tyn mama ki saasat ki anna.
Ka pasousouenaukamou ka assi k'mahynna nipasihtabung papahkissi ta ti Salomon tou tou ymmid ki keirangen ki kidi tyn mama ki saasat ki anna.
S.TRANSL: Ende ick segghe u oock dat Salomon in alle syneheerlickhepdt niet mis e-bekleedt ghewetlt ghelijck een ban dese. |
And yet I say unto you, That even Solomon in all his glory was not arrayed like one of these.
然而我告訴你們，就是所羅門極榮華的時候，他所穿戴的，還不如這花一朵呢！

S.FORM: Irou k'ma-hynna pa-pammia ta Alid ki alouf ka itou-pa-poulæh hnyn ki wæ'i k'atta, ka pou-qua-auh oudamei tou ta toullou-en, assi kana papa-saoun-ah (papammia) ymoumi-æn, ka ousi-syng-kamou ki tna-msing-an?
Irou k'mahynna papammia ta Alid ki alouf ka itoupapoulæh hnyn ki wæ'i k'atta, ka pouquaauh oudamei tou ta toullouen, assi kana papasaounah (papammia) ymoumiæn, ka ousisyngkamou ki tnamsingan?
S.TRANSL: Indien nu Godt het mras des belts dat heden is ende morgen in den oben geworyen wordt alsoo bekleet en sal hy u niet beel meer skleeden, Ghy kleen-geloobige,
Wherefore, if God so clothe the grass of the field, which to day is, and to morrow is cast into the oven, shall he not much more clothe you, O ye of little faith?
你們這小信的人哪！野地裏的草今天還在，明天就丟在爐裏，上帝還給它這樣的妝飾，何況你們呢！

S.FORM: Alei ki atta, ynna pæh-kbou ki rÿh, mattæi-k'ma-hynna ki sou: Mang ta kan-au-miæn? mang ta yht-au-miæn?
Alei ki atta, ynna pæhkbou ki rÿh, mattæik'mahynna ki sou: Mang ta kanaumiæn? mang ta yhtaumiæn?
S.TRANSL: Baerom en zyt niet beforght segghende: Wat fullen wp eten: of watsullen wy drincken + of waer mede fullen wp ons kleden? |
Therefore take no thought, saying, What shall we eat? or, What shall we drink? or, Wherewithal shall we be clothed?
所以，不要憂慮說，吃甚麼？喝甚麼？穿甚麼？

S.FORM: Alei ka kiym-en ta mamang k'atta ki Heidang. Ka kavan-an ki Raraman-oumi ka irou-tounnoun ki vullum ka mæi-æ -poô-kamou ki mamang k'atta.
Alei ka kiymen ta mamang k'atta ki Heidang. Ka kavanan ki Raramanoumi ka iroutounnoun ki vullum ka mæiæ poôkamou ki mamang k'atta.
S.TRANSL: Want alle dese dingen soecken de Heydenen. Want uwe Hemelsche Dade? weet dar ghp alle dese dingen behHoekr.
(For after all these things do the Gentiles seek:) for your heavenly Father knoweth that ye have need of all these things.
這都是外邦人所求的。你們需用的這一切東西，你們的天父是知道的。

S.FORM: Râ maki-ouro-â kmiym ki pei-sasou-an ki Alid, ki katiktik-an-appa tyn-da, ka ymmid ki mamang katta pæä-tæuut-eihkamou-ra.
Râ makiouroâ kmiym ki peisasouan ki Alid, ki katiktikanappa tynda, ka ymmid ki mamang katta pæätæuuteihkamoura.
S.TRANSL: Mae? soeckt eextt Het Koninckrijcke Godts ende ine gherechtigheydt mde alle dese dingen sullen-u toegeworpen worden.
But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.
你們要先求他的國和他的義，這些東西都要加給你們了。

S.FORM: Alei ki atta ynna pæh-kbou ki wæ'i ka onda-mei-ah: ka ouda-mei ki wæ'i ta ma-kbou-ah ki á teni-ah; Tæia-dludlugh ta 'æu-wi-'i ki katt'-'e-en tyn mamadou. Rapapyttou ki lbægh ki soulat
Alei ki atta ynna pæhkbou ki wæ'i ka ondameiah: ka oudamei ki wæ'i ta makbouah ki á teniah; Tæiadludlugh ta 'æuwi'i ki katt''een tyn mamadou. Rapapyttou ki lbægh ki soulat
S.TRANSL: Vijt dan niet belorgt tegen den morghen: want de morghen al boor het (ijne ssrghen (elcken) dagh heeft genoeg aen shns lelfs quaer,
Take therefore no thought for the morrow: for the morrow shall take thought for the things of itself. Sufficient unto the day is the evil thereof.
所以，不要為明天憂慮，因為明天自有明天的憂慮；一天的難處一天當就夠了。＂
